_comment: OpenOutreach campaign config for Kamal — house fund goal
_managed_by: Kamil — do not edit manually, use openoutreach-manager.py

campaign.name: Freelance Client Outreach — Django/AI Senior Engineer
campaign.objective: Connect with CTOs, Engineering Managers, Founders, and Technical leads at tech startups (5-200 employees). I am Muhammad Kamal, a Senior Backend Engineer. My outreach approach is value-first: I reference something specific about their company, tie it to a real automation or engineering problem I can solve, and offer a concrete demo or proof-of-concept — no questions, no pitching on first contact. I never open with 'How do you handle X?' — instead I observe what they're doing and mention one specific thing I can automate or improve.
campaign.target_market: CTOs, VPs of Engineering, Engineering Managers, Founders, or Technical Co-founders at: (1) SaaS startups needing backend engineers, (2) EdTech companies building LMS or teacher tools, (3) Companies building AI agents or automation workflows, (4) Companies using Django/Python who need senior help, (5) Companies wanting to integrate Claude/LLMs into their products. Company size: 5-200 employees. Stage: Seed to Series B. Location: US, UK, Canada, Australia, or remote-first anywhere.
campaign.message_strategy: 3-message sequence only. Message 1: relevant observation + tiny value, no ask. Message 2 (only if they reply): deliver demo/example. Message 3: propose small paid commitment. Never ask 'how do you handle X' — that signals salesperson, not peer engineer.

message_templates.connection_request: Hi {{first_name}}, I'm a Senior Backend Engineer (Django/Python/AWS) who also builds AI agents. Saw your work at {{company}} — looked interesting. Happy to connect.
message_templates.follow_up_1: Hi {{first_name}} — saw you're running {{company}}. Teams at your stage usually lose hours to manual {{specific_task}} work. I build small AI agents that handle exactly that — happy to send a 60-sec demo of one I made if it's useful.
message_templates.follow_up_2: Here's a quick demo of an agent I built that auto-qualifies inbound leads and drafts replies: https://oykamal.netlify.app/ — I could adapt something similar for {{company}}'s workflow. Want me to mock one up?
message_templates.follow_up_3: Hi {{first_name}}, last message from me. I can build a quick proof-of-concept for {{company}}'s {{specific_task}} free of charge — if it works for you, we talk about a paid setup. 15 min to walk through it? Either way, feel free to reach out at oyekamalkhan@gmail.com.

kamal_profile.name: Muhammad Kamal
kamal_profile.title: Senior Backend Engineer | Python • Django • AWS • AI Agents
kamal_profile.headline_achievement: 40% latency reduction, zero-downtime migrations on millions of rows, 10K+ DAU production system at Taleemabad
